parameters.jsCode: return { json: { success: false, error: $input.first().json.message || 'Login failed' } };

const res = $input.first().json;
return { json: { _src: 'usage', _raw: res, totalUsage: res.total_usage || 0, items: (res.line_items || []).map(item => ({ name: item.name, cost: item.cost, limit: item.limit, usage: item.usage })) } };
